title: Titanium Visuals
description: Optimized Vanilla High Quality with Custom player & mobs animation with custom textures with 3D textures for some items
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ef75eeee34bb6cc96d64a97b0f6252422ff6845.png)
## Information

**we use Optimization Mods to make the client get more _Frames Per Second_ , at the same time we also use high quality textures and recourse packs such as Player Animations , 3D Items & more to make it Vanilla Friendly Quality.**

## Links

**Our Discord Server** https://discord.gg/bbTtW32Kmv

## FAQ

**Whats this modpack about**: _this modpack is about or for Vanilla Friendly Vibe while Focusing on Optimization for better gameplay_

**What are the Features in this modpack**: 

● Fresh First Person & 3rd person animations

● Fresh Animations For Mobs

● More Vanilla Friendly Textures

● Vanilla Friendly Shaders

● Client-Side Modpack

## Platform

[Available for Fabric](https://modrinth.com/modpack/titanium-visual/versions)
